name: Profrontation's Chili Con Carne - Mexican
recipeInstructions:
1. In the bacon fat, lightly brown onion and garlic. Remove.
2. To the fat, add chili powder mixed with 1 tablespoon flour. Ensure there is enough fat or add more so it mixes well.
3. Stir until smooth. Add meat, stirring until all the chili mixture is absorbed.
4. Brown the mixture. Stir in tomatoes and cook gently for 20 minutes.
5. Add bay leaves, oregano, vinegar, and brown sugar. Cook for another 20 minutes.
6. Add kidney beans and cook slowly for 2 hours.
7. Finally, add black olives.
This recipe remains faithful to the original while improving clarity and consistency.
